prompt: Dear Mr Martin,  Thank  for your interest in my request for this job. I have long aspired to be sport instructor.  I believe I am a good intructor. I have a great passion for this basketball witch I have been practiced for  fifteen years. Not only  I practice the basketball, but I also pratice tennis, swimming, and baseball.  Not only do I have a lot of years of experience, but I also have tge ACE, CPR, and AED certificates.  I am an enthusiastic, outgoing and motivating personality. I believe I am abble to motivate every person and to develop personal exercise program for individuals.  Thank you for your time.   Yours sincerely,  Roxane
